vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Carries wing spar loads into fuselage spine
Avionics cooling airflow through service holes
Thermal management from sun to fuselage spine
Motion transfer from ruddervator to stabilizer
Atmospheric pressure on belly camera window
Electrical and data flow from avionics bay to harness pass-through
Human access and serviceability through service holes

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present and correctly named.
verify.rule: All required evidence_features must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All physical features are distributed across the local subsystem volume with real dimensions.
verify.rule: Every physical feature must include args.at [x,y,z] and real dimensions.

verify.value: Each interface has a named exact neighboring subsystem label and chosen connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to CFRP and aluminum interface.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility and joint integrity.

risk.desc: Service access holes may be too small for maintenance.
risk.mit: Review and possibly enlarge service access holes to ensure ease of maintenance.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for GPS boom mount may cause interference.
risk.mit: Review GPS boom mount clearance and adjust if necessary to prevent interference.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment in snap-fit interfaces due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct fit checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening bolts leading to material fatigue or damage.
risk.mit: Specify torque values for all bolted interfaces and train assembly personnel.

Verify assembly order of interfaces to ensure proper fit and function

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each subsystem must include all required evidence_features and adjacent_interfaces.

verify.value: Estimated mass is 2000g.
verify.rule: The subsystem's estimated mass must fit within the vehicle's mass budget.

verify.value: All features in part_tree have corresponding geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces are reciprocal with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must name exact neighboring subsystem labels with connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

risk.desc: Potential structural failure due to insufficient spar thickness.
risk.mit: Increase spar thickness to 20mm.

risk.desc: Risk of nacelle detachment due to inadequate tilt axis clearance.
risk.mit: Ensure tilt axis clearance is at least 1.5mm.

risk.desc: Possibility of landing gear failure due to insufficient mount clearance.
risk.mit: Increase landing gear mount clearance to 0.7mm.

risk.desc: Risk of fuselage spine detachment due to insufficient socket clearance.
risk.mit: Ensure socket clearance is at least 0.6mm.

risk.desc: Potential access cover failure due to inadequate clearance.
risk.mit: Increase access cover clearance to 0.6mm.

physics_paths.path: Tilt mechanism loads route through bearing seats into wing structure via named fittings
physics_paths.description: Nacelle loads are transferred through the wing spar to the fuselage spine

Heat from the wing surface dissipates into the environment
Nacelle tilt mechanism rotates around the wing spar
Aerodynamic pressure acts on the wing surface during flight
Electrical wiring harness connects the wing spar to the fuselage
Ground crew accesses motor and servo modules through access covers
